creator: max@wide.ad.jp
text:
> Ok, I checked and you're definitely right on issue no.1 here
     > I'm sending the update attached.

Ok, No.1 is cleared.  And the newer patch applied cleanly, so No.2 is
cleared as well.  And in private mail, I decided to honor the
maintainer's decision about No.3.

So, the update will be imported shortly.

Max
